title: diasperus gasstroemii
intro: Diasperus gasstroemii, also known as the Dipterocarp tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Dipterocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Diasperus gasstroemii lie in its bark, which contains a compound called 2,3-seco-13(16), 14-dien-5-ol, that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Diasperus gasstroemii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Diasperus gasstroemii is often prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
